title: Early Binding vs. Late Binding in C++
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process and different outcomes for function calls based on whether they are resolved at compile-time (Early Binding) or run-time (Late Binding) in C++.
relationships: Compile Time leads to Function Call being resolved into Compiled Code (Early Bound)
Run Time leads to Function Call requiring a vtable Lookup (Late Bound)
Both Compiled Code and vtable Lookup result in Resolved Function Execution
